title: Simple Cams
description: Simple Cams is minecraft datapack that helps players in recording cinematic Shots or videos in vanilla minecraft and best part is it supports survival!
body:
# Info Simple Cams is minecraft datapack that helps players in recording cinematic Shots or videos in vanilla minecraft and best part is it supports survival! The Datapack is divided into 2 parts Camera and Rotator. Both can be controlled and modified through the new added commands. ## Commands **/trigger cam.spawn** - spawns camera **/trigger cam.speed** - changes camera's speed **/trigger cam.time** - used to set time of camera's movement **/trigger cam.visuals** - toggles ability to see camera **/trigger clear** - clears camera/rotator in 3 block radius **/trigger rotator.spawn** - spawns a rotator # How to use? Start looking in direction you want and spawn a camera by using **/trigger cam.spawn** . The camera will point at the direction you choose.

Then to change the direction of camera use a rotator which can be summoned trough **/trigger rotator.spawn**. Rotator allows player to change camera's direction and it works similar to camera. Now to get started with using the camera. Use **/trigger cam.time set (Value)** and stand close to the camera. To Change camera's speed use **/trigger cam.speed**
